label: Ritual position (in circle)
description: Places the pawn in a circular arrangement around the ritual target at the given distance range.

preferredRotation.label: Preferred rotation
preferredRotation.description: Preferred cardinal direction the pawn should face. Omit to use any direction.

distRange.label: Distance range
distRange.description: Min/max cell distance from the target at which the pawn may be placed.
